criteria.description: Backend catches OverloadedError (HTTP 529) and maps to 503 with user-friendly message
ainvoke_structured retries on OverloadedError before surfacing error
Global exception handler returns 503 JSON response for OverloadedError
SSE streaming yields [ERROR] event with status 503 for OverloadedError
Frontend displays 'AI service is currently overloaded' message for 503
Frontend shows retry button for 503 errors
Regression tests cover classify_anthropic_error, route handler, SSE stream, and frontend display for 529/503
